reason: All four FR-13 acceptance criteria are satisfied. (1) Three services defined: omnibot-api on port 8000, postgres using pgvector/pgvector:pg16 on 5432, redis using redis:7-alpine on 6379. (2) Both postgres and redis have healthchecks with interval/timeout/retries configured — postgres uses pg_isready, redis uses redis-cli ping with password. (3) omnibot-api.depends_on sets condition:service_healthy for both postgres and redis. (4) Redis is password-protected via --requirepass with ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-dev_redis_password} fallback, and the REDIS_URL env var includes the credential. Docker Compose performs YAML-level variable substitution before passing the healthcheck test array to the daemon, so the ${...} expansion in the healthcheck CMD list is correct. No regressions observed.
